The Gallows (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,764,410Details
International Box Office $20,200,000
Worldwide Box Office $42,964,410
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $996,359
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $394,640
Total $1,390,999
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Twenty years after an accident during a small town high school play results in death, students at the school resurrect the failed stage production in a misguided attempt to honor the anniversary of the tragedy—but ultimately find out that some things are better left alone.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,808,463 (43.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000 (worldwide box office is 429.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,720 opening theaters/2,720 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $32,296,844

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 10th, 2015 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: July 9th, 2015 (Wide) (Argentina)
July 9th, 2015 (Wide) (Lebanon)
July 9th, 2015 (Wide) (Slovakia)
July 9th, 2015 (Wide) (Taiwan)
July 9th, 2015 (Wide) (Hungary)
Video Release: September 25th, 2015 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for some disturbing violent content and terror.
(Rating bulletin 2380, 7/1/2015)
Running Time: 81 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Found Footage
Plot point: Accidental Death, Theater Actor
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Blumhouse, Tremendum Pictures, Entertainment 360
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
